name: bestocr
description: bestOCR for agents: the bestocr-mcp MCP server (multi-engine OCR routing — ocr/recommend/list_engines/list_models + ocr_status/ocr_result async polling, auto-downloaded on install). Local engines only: Apple Vision, tesseract, Python-tool adapters, Ollama VLMs; recommendations are evidence-labelled, never guesses.
